the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert located in the south of the country and is known for its unique landscape, ancient ruins, and diverse wildlife. other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the huguudug canyon, the khangai mountains, and the birthplace of genghis khan. the country also has many traditional yurt camps where visitors can experience the local culture and lifestyle.
